tasks.title: Split provider-provenance API families behind narrower controlRoomApi modules
tasks.description: Decompose `apps/web/src/controlRoomApi/providerProvenance.ts` into bounded feature-owned API modules for narrative governance, stitched-report governance, search moderation, exports, and scheduled reports while keeping `controlRoomApi.ts` import-stable as a barrel.
tasks.direction_relation_note: The detail doc says compatibility barrels should remain import-stable while real ownership moves into bounded modules, and the current provider-provenance API file is still the single direct owner for multiple unrelated bounded flows.
tasks.priority_reason: Kept as follow-up rather than queue head because the route extraction can proceed first, but this API split is still needed to stop future work from defaulting back into a monolithic provider-provenance control-room client file.

tasks.title: Split provider-provenance and query-builder type families behind narrower controlRoomDefinitions modules
tasks.description: Break `apps/web/src/controlRoomDefinitions/providerProvenance.ts` into bounded type/constant modules so provider-provenance, search-moderation, replay-link, and comparison-history consumers can import direct ownership modules while `controlRoomDefinitions.ts` stays as the compatibility barrel.

tasks.priority_reason: Queued as a proposal because it complements the route extraction and addresses the remaining barrel pressure, but it is safer to let the route-owned boundary settle before choosing the exact type-family split points.
